question: What are the revenue figures for Meta for Q1, Q2 and Q3?
answer: Q1 total revenue was $42.3 billion. Q2 total revenue was $39.1 billion. Q3 total revenue was $40.6 billion.

question: What metrics helped CCI determine if the combination would be anticompetitive?
answer: As is generally accepted, market concentration is auseful indicator of the likely competitive effects of acombination and Herfindahl Hirschman Index ("HHI") is one of the metrics used to assess the level of market concentration and the changes in the concentration due to a combination. If a combination fulfils such criteria, then However, if the Commission’s prime facie opinion is that notice for such combination may be given to the the combination is likely to cause an AAEC then CCI Commission in the form prescribed for Green Channel issues a show cause notice to the parties to combination, filing, disclosing the details of the proposed combination. required for giving effect to the combination before the Secretary within Remedies become necessary if the Commission raises seven days of such completion.
ground_truth: The CCI used the Herfindahl Hirschman Index to assess market concentration

question: What was the bench in the Eastman Kodak Case?
document_name: Eastman Kodak Co. v. Image Technical Services
ground_truth: BLACKMUN, J., delivered the opinion of the Court, in which REHNQUIST, C. J., and WHITE, STEVENS, KENNEDY, and SOUTER, JJ., joined. SCALIA, J., filed a dissenting opinion, in which O’CONNOR and THOMAS, JJ., joined.
ground_truth_doc_ref: Eastman Kodak Co. v. Image Technical Services, Inc., 504 U.S. 451 (1992) .pdf, p3

question: How many SCOTUS cases are in the set? Name them.
answer:
There are 5 SCOTUS cases in the set:
1. Bell Atlantic Corp. v. Twombly, 550 U.S. 544 (2007)
2. Brown Shoe Co., Inc. v. United States, 370 U.S. 294 (1962)
3. Eastman Kodak Co. v. Image Technical Services, Inc., 504 U.S. 451 (1992)
4. Standard Oil Co. of New Jersey v. United States, 221 U.S. 1 (1911)
5. United States v. Socony-Vacuum Oil Co., Inc., 310 U.S. 150 (1940)
document_name: Eastman Kodak Co. v. Image Technical Services
Standard Oil Co. of New Jersey v. United States
United States v. Socony-Vacuum Oil Co.
ground_truth:
There are 5 cases
Bell Atlantic Corp. v. Twombly, 550 U.S. 544 (2007)
Eastman Kodak Co. v. Image Technical Services, Inc., 504 U.S. 451 (1992)
Standard Oil Co. of New Jersey v. United States, 221 U.S. 1 (1911)
United States v. Socony-Vacuum Oil Co., Inc., 310 U.S. 150 (1940)
Brown Shoe Co., Inc. v. United States, 370 U.S. 294 (1962)

question: If Pristine were to acquire an indian company that had turnover of 1Cr and no assets, would it have to notify the deal to the CCI?
answer: The Competition (Minimum Value of Assets or Turnover) Rules, 2024 crystalize the de-minimis exemption and The Commission can impose a penalty of up to 1% of the stipulate that under section 5(e) of the Act (Combination), total turnover or value of assets, whichever is higher, of an acquisition, control, merger or amalgamation does not the combination for failure to notify the Commission. company has assets of the value of not more than INR 4.5 billion in India or turnover of not more than INR 12.5 The determination of joint control is case-specific and billion in India, from the filing requirement (“Target requires a careful evaluation of the relevant statutory and Exemption“). Transaction Value Threshold: In addition to the aforesaid ‘Turnover’ under the Act means the turnover certified by assets/value thresholds, all transactions where the the statutory auditor on the basis of the last available transaction value exceeds INR 20 billion and local nexus audited accounts of the company in the financial year requirement are met, prior approval of the Commission immediately preceding the financial year in which the will have to be taken.
ground_truth:
The thresholds for notification are:
Assets of the acquirer and target > INR 25 Billion; or
Revenue of the acquirer and target > INR 75 Billion


Pristine's revenue in 2021 was INR 5 billion; and total assets were INR 10 billion. Therefore, even after adding the turnover and the asset figures of the target, a notification will not be required.
